sso.description: Configure your domain to access security features including single sign-on.

verified_domains.description: Verify the ownership of an email domain to enable single-sign on.

add_domain.title: Add domain
add_domain.description: Add your domain to configure SSO and verify it.

form.domain_invalid: Enter a valid domain name (e.g., plane.so)

toast.success_message: Domain added successfully. Please verify it by adding the DNS TXT record.
toast.error_message: Failed to add domain. Please try again.

verify_domain.title: Verify your domain
verify_domain.description: Follow these steps to verify your domain.

instructions.label: Instructions
instructions.step_1: Go to the DNS settings for your domain host.

step_2.part_3: and paste the complete record value provided below.

instructions.step_3: This update usually takes a few minutes but may take up to 72 hours to complete.
instructions.step_4: Click "Verify domain" to confirm once your DNS record is updated.

verify_domain.verification_code_description: Add this record to your DNS settings

toast.error_message: Failed to verify domain. Please try again.

description.prefix: Are you sure you want to delete

toast.error_message: Failed to delete domain. Please try again.

providers.disabled_message: Add a verified domain to configure SSO

switch_alert_modal.title: Switch SSO Method to {newProviderShortName}?
switch_alert_modal.content: You are about to enable {newProviderLongName} ({newProviderShortName}). This action will automatically disable {activeProviderLongName} ({activeProviderShortName}). Users attempting to sign in via {activeProviderShortName} will no longer be able to access the platform until they switch to the new method. Are you sure you want to proceed?

configure.title: Enable SAML

entity_id.label: Entity ID | Audience | Metadata information
entity_id.description: We will generate this bit of the metadata that identifies this Plane app as an authorized service on your IdP.

callback_url.label: SSO URL
callback_url.description: We will generate this for you. Add this in the Sign-in redirect URL field of your IdP.

logout_url.label: SLO URL
logout_url.description: We will generate this for you. Add this in the Single Logout redirect URL field of your IdP.
